title: Retenzy.pdf
summaries:
* Retenzy is an all-in-one customer retention and loyalty platform designed primarily for e-commerce brands on Shopify.
* Founded in 2023 and headquartered in Pune, India, it combines customer rewards, referral structures, and product reviews to boost customer lifetime value (LTV).
* It features loyalty programs including points-based economies, tier-based VIP tracks, and custom milestones.
* The platform automates the collection of text, photo, and video reviews via scheduled emails or SMS.
* Review management features include syncing verified reviews with Google Shopping and generating SEO-rich snippets.
* It enables businesses to build custom referral networks to turn existing customers into brand advocates.

* Integrates with Google Shopping and generates SEO-rich snippets.
* Allows businesses to create custom referral networks.
* Supports membership tiers offering exclusive perks like early access, free shipping, or special discounts.
* Provides built-in email marketing flows for welcome emails, shipping updates, abandoned cart reminders, and post-purchase follow-ups.
* Retenzy features over 15 pre-built storefront widgets to display loyalty incentives and review sections without custom development.
